reviews.comment:
Soy residente, cargo toda la semana nafta, y hoy no solo que tuve que esperar 40 minutos para cargar.
Sino que tuve una falta de respeto total por el empleado que me atendió. No se puede tener personal que falten el respeto a una mujer ni a nadie. Espero tener una respuesta y que no vuelva a pasar.
ACA San Clemente. Una verdadera vergüenza

(Translated by Google)
I'm a resident, I fill up my tank every week, and today not only did I have to wait 40 minutes to fill up, but I also received a complete lack of respect from the employee who served me. It's unacceptable to have staff who disrespect a woman or anyone else. I expect a response and hope this doesn't happen again. ACA San Clemente. A real disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlX3R5ODdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio, baños correctos, en agosto, en verano veremos, funcionaban sólo dos expendedoras de combustible y para la temporada estuvo bien

(Translated by Google)
Good service, decent restrooms. In August, we'll see how it is in the summer. Only two fuel pumps were working, but it was fine for the season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1ay1XaEdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Estoy acostumbrado a cargar en la YPF de Castelar y del ACA, dónde la atención es inmejorable, por ejemplo, nadie te pregunta si te limpian los vidrios, lo hacen directamente....
Además mucha amabilidad...

(Translated by Google)
I'm used to filling up at the YPF in Castelar and the ACA, where the service is unbeatable. For example, nobody asks if you want your windows cleaned; they just do it. Plus, they're very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlOUw3VjJBRRAB
